acceptanceReviewed.criterion: madobectl exposes display status and lifecycle commands.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: apps/cli/src/lib.rs and madobectl unit tests cover status, create, park, remove, and smoke parsing/output.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: hostd uses the adapter contract rather than Hyprland internals.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: hostd::run_display_action is generic over CompositorAdapter; hostd tests use a mock adapter. The real Hyprland function is only the adapter construction boundary.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: CLI output is deterministic enough for tests.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Status rendering sorts outputs and all renderers use fixed field ordering; covered by focused tests.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux hardware validation commands are documented.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/LINUX_ORCHESTRATOR.md includes Remote Display Control Smoke commands, expected monitor evidence, and cleanup instructions.

realWorldValidation.evidence: The node documents hardware validation commands. Non-mutating live status probes from both implementor and Linux orchestrator shells failed because Hyprland state was unavailable.

resolvedFindings.title: Clippy ownership findings in hostd smoke helper
resolvedFindings.observed: Initial just check failed on needless_pass_by_value and redundant_clone.
resolvedFindings.expected: Workspace clippy gate passes with -D warnings.
resolvedFindings.summary: run_smoke now borrows OutputId and the redundant test clone was removed.

resolvedFindings.title: Forbidden expect_err in CLI test
resolvedFindings.observed: Second just check failed on clippy::expect_used.
resolvedFindings.expected: Tests avoid expect/unwrap under workspace lint policy.
resolvedFindings.summary: The test now uses an explicit match for the expected usage error.
